# cloudless_storage (Resource)

A storage volume on a Fluence cluster.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "cloudless_storage" "data" {
  cluster_id   = data.cloudless_cluster.main.id
  name         = "data"
  storage_type = "NVME"
  volume_gb    = 200
  replicated   = false
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `cluster_id` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `replicated` (Boolean)
- `storage_type` (String)
- `volume_gb` (Number) Volume size in GB. In-place resizes via PATCH; the operation may be disruptive (VM restart, data migration) — see provider docs.

### Optional

- `os_image` (String) URL of an OS image. Presence makes this a boot disk.

### Read-Only

- `attached_to` (List of String)
- `created_at` (String)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `role` (String)
- `status` (String)
- `user_id` (String)
